strengths: Deep experience with distributed systems and real-time data processing (e.g., microservices at Dunnhumby handling millions of requests/sec)
Proven track record in AI-agent infrastructure development (e.g., MCP code generators and agentic workflows at re:cinq)
Strong engineering leadership with emphasis on testability, CI/CD, and disciplined development practices
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience, which is a core requirement for this role
No explicit evidence of operating multi-agent AI systems in production within a regulated or commercial environment
Scant evidence of scaling engineering teams beyond 10-15 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical depth in distributed systems, real-time data processing, and AI-agent infrastructure, aligning well with core architectural requirements. However, his resume lacks critical fintech domain experience (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management) and evidence of scaling engineering organizations to the levels required for a venture-backed scale-up. His background in AI-agent tooling is promising but not explicitly tied to production multi-agent systems in high-stakes commercial environments.
